The native has Saturn in Taurus and Venus conjunct Mars in Aquarius
which gives exchange of places to Saturn and Venus. The native will,
therefore, have two marriages. Both the wives will be of very good character.
When Jupiter enters Leo, he will get the aspect of Venus. Hence, in his

280 BHRlGU NANDI NADI
22nd and 25th years he will face some troubles. When Jupiter contacts Rahu
at 28th year, he will suffer from wind troubles.
At the age of26-37, when Venus transits Cancer the native's elder\. ife
will pass away.
After 67-68, when Jupiter transits Aquarius where Venus is situated, tt:.:;
native will terminate his terrestrial existence and take birth elsewhere.
